summary.key_theme: IBM 因第二季初步財報表現疲軟，導致單日股價重挫 25 %，引發市場對其全年財測下調的擔憂與分析師降評潮。

bullish.title: IBM (NYSE:IBM) Joins Team ORION For UK Defence Logistics And Digital Frameworks
bullish.reason: IBM 加入 Team ORION 聯盟以支持英國國防物流與數位框架，顯示公司在政府與國防領域仍具備業務拓展能力，但對短期股價跌勢的緩解作用有限。

bearish.title: Why Did IBM Stock Plunge 25% in One Day? Preliminary Q2 Results Were Weak, But Not Terrible
bearish.reason: IBM 公布疲軟的第二季初步財報，導致單日市值蒸發約 680 億美元，市場高度擔憂公司將在正式財報中下調 2026 年全年財測。

bearish.title: Oppenheimer Downgraded IBM Following Its Sharp Post-Earnings Drop. What the Warning Means for IBM Stock.
bearish.reason: Oppenheimer 在 IBM 股價重挫後下調評級並撤回目標價，反映華爾街對其未來獲利能力的信心動搖。

bearish.title: IBM Just Had the Worst Crash in Its 115-Year History. For the Retiree Who Treated It as a Safe Dividend Anchor, That’s the Real Lesson.
bearish.reason: 此次 25 % 的跌幅為 IBM 歷史罕見，嚴重打擊了長期將其視為穩定配息標的的投資人信心，可能導致機構資金流出。

bearish.title: Why Is IBM Stock Falling Friday? — IBM stock hits $211 as a "death cross" and fresh analyst downgrades signal continued bearish momentum ahead of J
bearish.reason: 技術面出現「死亡交叉」訊號，加上分析師持續降評，顯示市場對 IBM 的賣壓尚未結束，短期動能極度疲弱。

bearish.title: Chamath Palihapitiya on IBM Stock Drop, AI Spending Concerns: ‘You’re Starting to See a Little Bit of the Wheels Come Off’
bearish.reason: 知名投資人 Chamath Palihapitiya 公開質疑 AI 支出熱潮的持續性，並以 IBM 的崩跌作為市場動能減弱的指標，加劇了市場恐慌。

neutral.title: IBM Vice Chairman Gary Cohn: Our software is not being disrupted by AI
neutral.reason: 副董事長 Gary Cohn 試圖安撫市場，強調 IBM 軟體業務未受 AI 顛覆，但此類言論在股價重挫背景下顯得蒼白無力，未改變市場悲觀情緒。

neutral.title: How options traders should play this legacy tech name after its steep pullback
neutral.reason: 分析師針對 IBM 股價大跌後的選擇權交易策略進行討論，屬於中性的市場操作建議，不影響公司基本面。
